prompt: Update task T2 status from 'in_progress' to 'completed' in the existing UPM document. The state block currently shows: T1=completed, T2=in_progress, T3=pending.

assertions.name: t2_updated_to_completed
assertions.description: T2 status must be updated to 'completed'

assertions.name: other_tasks_unchanged
assertions.description: T1 and T3 statuses must remain unchanged
